subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! That which thou didst pen was perused and its contents were apprehended. Although the letter, in its form [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل شد هر چند نامه لفظا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @zeal and fervor in teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
